problem_statement: Given an array of integers A and an integer B. Find the total number of subarrays having bitwise XOR of all elements equal to k.

examples.explanation: The subarrays having XOR of their elements as 6 are  [4, 2], [4, 2, 2, 6, 4], [2, 2, 6], [6]
The subarrays having XOR of their elements as 5 are [5] and [5, 6, 7, 8, 9]
